[index.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26908416/index.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>SINTAXEM — Design & Productions</title>
  <meta name="description" content="Estudio de artes gráficas especializado en vinilos, rotulación de vehículos, cartelería y decoración de interiores. Barcelona & Tarragona." />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=DM+Sans:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..40,300;0,9..40,400;0,9..40,500;1,9..40,300&family=DM+Mono:wght@300;400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
  <style>
    /* ============ VARIABLES ============ */
    :root {
      --black: #0a0a0a;
      --white: #f5f2ed;
      --cream: #ede9e2;
      --cube-blue: #5bc4d8;
      --cube-green: #a8c832;
      --cube-pink: #e8285a;
      --accent: #e8285a;
      --accent2: #a8c832;
      --mid: #2a2a2a;
      --muted: #888;
      --border: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    }

    /* ============ RESET ============ */
    *, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body {
      font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
      background: var(--black);
      color: var(--white);
      overflow-x: hidden;
      cursor: none;
    }

    /* ============ CUSTOM CURSOR ============ */
    .cursor {
      position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 12px; height: 12px;
      background: var(--accent); border-radius: 50%;
      pointer-events: none; z-index: 9999;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      transition: transform 0.1s, width 0.2s, height 0.2s, background 0.2s;
      mix-blend-mode: difference;
    }
    .cursor-ring {
      position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 36px; height: 36px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(232,40,90,0.5); border-radius: 50%;
      pointer-events: none; z-index: 9998;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      transition: transform 0.15s ease-out, width 0.3s, height 0.3s;
    }
    body:has(a:hover) .cursor, body:has(button:hover) .cursor { width: 24px; height: 24px; }

    /* ============ NAV ============ */
    nav {
      position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
      padding: 24px 48px;
      mix-blend-mode: normal;
      transition: background 0.4s, padding 0.4s;
    }
    nav.scrolled {
      background: rgba(10,10,10,0.92);
      backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
      padding: 16px 48px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .nav-logo {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
      text-decoration: none;
    }
    .nav-logo-cube {
      width: 32px; height: 32px;
      position: relative;
    }
    .nav-logo-cube svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; }
    .nav-logo-text {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 22px; letter-spacing: 4px;
      color: var(--white);
    }
    .nav-links {
      display: flex; gap: 40px; list-style: none;
    }
    .nav-links a {
      font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--muted);
      text-decoration: none;
      transition: color 0.2s;
      cursor: none;
    }
    .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--white); }
    .nav-cta {
      background: var(--accent);
      color: var(--white) !important;
      padding: 10px 20px !important;
      letter-spacing: 2px !important;
      transition: background 0.2s !important;
    }
    .nav-cta:hover { background: #c01f48 !important; color: var(--white) !important; }

    /* ============ HERO ============ */
    .hero {
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .hero-left {
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end;
      padding: 160px 48px 80px;
      position: relative; z-index: 2;
    }
    .hero-tag {
      font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 3px;
      color: var(--cube-green);
      text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
      opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.2s forwards;
    }
    .hero-title {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(72px, 9vw, 130px);
      line-height: 0.92;
      letter-spacing: 2px;
      margin-bottom: 32px;
      opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.4s forwards;
    }
    .hero-title span { color: var(--accent); }
    .hero-subtitle {
      font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300;
      color: rgba(245,242,237,0.6);
      line-height: 1.7; max-width: 380px;
      margin-bottom: 48px;
      opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.6s forwards;
    }
    .hero-actions {
      display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;
      opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.8s forwards;
    }
    .btn-primary {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
      background: var(--accent);
      color: var(--white);
      padding: 16px 32px;
      font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 2px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      text-decoration: none;
      transition: all 0.2s;
      cursor: none;
    }
    .btn-primary:hover { background: #c01f48; transform: translateY(-2px); }
    .btn-secondary {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
      color: var(--muted);
      padding: 16px 0;
      font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 2px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      text-decoration: none;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      transition: color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
      cursor: none;
    }
    .btn-secondary:hover { color: var(--white); border-color: var(--white); }

    .hero-right {
      position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    }
    .hero-image-grid {
      position: absolute; inset: 0;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-rows: 60% 40%;
    }
    .hero-img-main {
      background: var(--mid);
      overflow: hidden;
      position: relative;
    }
    .hero-img-main img {
      width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
      filter: grayscale(10%) contrast(1.05);
      transform: scale(1.05);
      transition: transform 8s ease;
    }
    .hero-img-main:hover img { transform: scale(1); }
    .hero-img-main::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(232,40,90,0.15) 0%, transparent 60%);
    }
    .hero-img-row {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 2px;
    }
    .hero-img-small {
      background: var(--mid); overflow: hidden;
    }
    .hero-img-small img {
      width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
      filter: grayscale(15%);
      transition: filter 0.4s, transform 0.4s;
    }
    .hero-img-small:hover img { filter: grayscale(0%); transform: scale(1.05); }

    /* Grid overlay lines */
    .hero::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background-image:
        linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 60px 60px;
      pointer-events: none; z-index: 1;
    }

    .hero-scroll-hint {
      position: absolute; bottom: 40px; left: 48px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
      font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 2px;
      color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase;
      opacity: 0; animation: fadeIn 1s ease 1.2s forwards;
      z-index: 3;
    }
    .scroll-line {
      width: 40px; height: 1px; background: var(--muted);
      transform-origin: left;
      animation: expandLine 1s ease 1.4s both;
    }

    /* ============ STATS BAR ============ */
    .stats-bar {
      background: var(--accent);
      padding: 20px 48px;
      display: flex; justify-content: space-around;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .stat-item {
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
    }
    .stat-num {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 32px; letter-spacing: 2px;
      color: var(--white);
    }
    .stat-label {
      font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 2px;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    /* ============ SERVICIOS ============ */
    .section { padding: 120px 48px; }
    .section-header {
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end;
      margin-bottom: 80px;
    }
    .section-label {
      font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 3px;
      color: var(--cube-green); text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }
    .section-title {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(48px, 6vw, 80px);
      line-height: 0.95; letter-spacing: 1px;
    }
    .section-title em {
      font-style: normal; color: var(--accent);
    }
    .section-link {
      font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2px;
      color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase;
      text-decoration: none;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding-bottom: 4px;
      transition: color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
      cursor: none;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .section-link:hover { color: var(--white); border-color: var(--white); }

    .services-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
      gap: 2px;
    }
    .service-card {
      background: var(--mid);
      padding: 48px 32px;
      position: relative; overflow: hidden;
      cursor: none;
      transition: background 0.3s;
      border: 1px solid transparent;
    }
    .service-card:hover { background: #1a1a1a; border-color: var(--border); }
    .service-card::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px;
      background: var(--accent);
      transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left;
      transition: transform 0.4s ease;
    }
    .service-card:hover::before { transform: scaleX(1); }

    .service-num {
      font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2px;
      color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-bottom: 32px;
    }
    .service-icon {
      width: 48px; height: 48px; margin-bottom: 24px;
    }
    .service-name {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 28px; letter-spacing: 1px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      line-height: 1;
    }
    .service-desc {
      font-size: 14px; font-weight: 300;
      color: rgba(245,242,237,0.55);
      line-height: 1.7;
    }
    .service-arrow {
      position: absolute; bottom: 32px; right: 32px;
      width: 32px; height: 32px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      transition: all 0.3s;
    }
    .service-card:hover .service-arrow {
      background: var(--accent); border-color: var(--accent);
    }

    /* ============ TRABAJOS ============ */
    .works-section { padding: 120px 48px; background: #0d0d0d; }
    .works-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1.5fr 1fr;
      grid-template-rows: auto auto;
      gap: 4px;
    }
    .work-card {
      position: relative; overflow: hidden;
      aspect-ratio: 4/3;
      background: var(--mid);
      cursor: none;
    }
    .work-card:first-child {
      grid-row: 1 / 3;
      aspect-ratio: auto;
    }
    .work-card img {
      width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
      transition: transform 0.6s ease, filter 0.4s;
      filter: grayscale(15%);
    }
    .work-card:hover img { transform: scale(1.05); filter: grayscale(0%); }
    .work-overlay {
      position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(10,10,10,0.85) 0%, transparent 50%);
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end;
      padding: 32px;
      opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.4s;
    }
    .work-card:hover .work-overlay { opacity: 1; }
    .work-tag {
      font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 2px;
      color: var(--cube-green); text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    .work-title {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 24px; letter-spacing: 1px;
    }

    /* ============ PROCESO ============ */
    .proceso-section { padding: 120px 48px; }
    .proceso-grid {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
      gap: 0;
      margin-top: 80px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .proceso-step {
      padding: 48px 32px;
      border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
      position: relative;
    }
    .proceso-step:last-child { border-right: none; }
    .proceso-step-num {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 72px; line-height: 1;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
      position: absolute; top: 24px; right: 24px;
    }
    .proceso-icon {
      width: 40px; height: 40px;
      background: var(--accent);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }
    .proceso-title {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 22px; letter-spacing: 1px;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }
    .proceso-desc {
      font-size: 13px; font-weight: 300;
      color: rgba(245,242,237,0.5);
      line-height: 1.7;
    }

    /* ============ SOBRE NOSOTROS ============ */
    .about-section {
      padding: 120px 48px;
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 80px; align-items: center;
      background: var(--cream);
      color: var(--black);
    }
    .about-image-stack { position: relative; height: 500px; }
    .about-img-1 {
      position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0;
      width: 70%; height: 80%;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .about-img-1 img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
    .about-img-2 {
      position: absolute; bottom: 0; right: 0;
      width: 55%; height: 60%;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 4px solid var(--cream);
    }
    .about-img-2 img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
    .about-badge {
      position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      background: var(--accent);
      color: white;
      width: 100px; height: 100px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 1px;
      text-align: center;
      z-index: 10;
      border: 4px solid var(--cream);
    }
    .about-badge span { font-size: 28px; display: block; }

    .about-content .section-label { color: var(--accent); }
    .about-title {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(40px, 5vw, 64px);
      line-height: 0.95; letter-spacing: 1px;
      color: var(--black);
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }
    .about-title em { font-style: normal; color: var(--accent); }
    .about-text {
      font-size: 15px; font-weight: 300;
      color: rgba(10,10,10,0.65);
      line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 16px;
    }
    .about-skills {
      display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px;
      margin-top: 32px;
    }
    .skill-tag {
      font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 1px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      padding: 8px 16px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(10,10,10,0.2);
      color: var(--black);
    }

    /* ============ ZONAS ============ */
    .zonas-bar {
      background: var(--mid);
      padding: 32px 48px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 48px;
      border-top: 2px solid var(--accent);
    }
    .zonas-label {
      font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 3px;
      color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .zonas-list {
      display: flex; gap: 32px; flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .zona {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 20px; letter-spacing: 2px;
      color: var(--white);
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    }
    .zona::before {
      content: '◆'; font-size: 8px; color: var(--accent);
    }

    /* ============ CONTACTO ============ */
    .contact-section {
      padding: 120px 48px;
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 80px;
    }
    .contact-left .section-title { font-size: clamp(48px, 7vw, 96px); }
    .contact-info {
      margin-top: 48px;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px;
    }
    .contact-item {
      display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 16px;
    }
    .contact-item-icon {
      width: 40px; height: 40px; flex-shrink: 0;
      background: var(--mid);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    }
    .contact-item-content {}
    .contact-item-label {
      font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 2px;
      color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-bottom: 4px;
    }
    .contact-item-value {
      font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400;
    }
    .contact-item-value a {
      color: var(--white); text-decoration: none;
      transition: color 0.2s; cursor: none;
    }
    .contact-item-value a:hover { color: var(--accent); }

    .contact-form {
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px;
    }
    .form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
    .form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
    .form-label {
      font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 2px;
      color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase;
    }
    .form-input, .form-select, .form-textarea {
      background: var(--mid);
      border: 1px solid transparent;
      padding: 14px 16px;
      color: var(--white);
      font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
      font-size: 14px;
      transition: border-color 0.2s;
      outline: none;
    }
    .form-input:focus, .form-select:focus, .form-textarea:focus {
      border-color: var(--accent);
    }
    .form-select { appearance: none; cursor: none; }
    .form-textarea { height: 120px; resize: none; }
    .form-submit {
      background: var(--accent);
      color: var(--white);
      border: none;
      padding: 18px 40px;
      font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 3px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      cursor: none;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
      transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
      align-self: flex-start;
    }
    .form-submit:hover { background: #c01f48; transform: translateY(-2px); }

    .whatsapp-btn {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
      background: #25d366;
      color: var(--white);
      padding: 16px 32px;
      text-decoration: none;
      font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 2px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-top: 8px;
      transition: all 0.2s;
      cursor: none;
    }
    .whatsapp-btn:hover { background: #1db954; transform: translateY(-2px); }

    /* ============ FOOTER ============ */
    footer {
      background: #050505;
      padding: 48px;
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .footer-logo {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 18px; letter-spacing: 4px;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    }
    .footer-copy {
      font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
      font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 1px;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    }
    .footer-social {
      display: flex; gap: 16px;
    }
    .footer-social a {
      width: 36px; height: 36px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      color: var(--muted); text-decoration: none;
      transition: all 0.2s; cursor: none;
    }
    .footer-social a:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); }

    /* ============ ANIMATIONS ============ */
    @keyframes fadeUp {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); }
      to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    @keyframes fadeIn {
      from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes expandLine {
      from { transform: scaleX(0); } to { transform: scaleX(1); }
    }
    @keyframes float {
      0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
      50% { transform: translateY(-8px); }
    }

    .reveal {
      opacity: 0; transform: translateY(32px);
      transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s ease;
    }
    .reveal.visible {
      opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0);
    }

    /* ============ MOBILE ============ */
    @media (max-width: 900px) {
      nav { padding: 20px 24px; }
      .nav-links { display: none; }
      .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; min-height: auto; }
      .hero-left { padding: 120px 24px 60px; }
      .hero-right { height: 50vw; }
      .hero-image-grid { position: relative; height: 100%; }
      .section, .works-section, .proceso-section { padding: 80px 24px; }
      .services-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
      .works-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .work-card:first-child { grid-row: auto; }
      .proceso-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
      .about-section { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding: 80px 24px; }
      .contact-section { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding: 80px 24px; }
      .form-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      footer { flex-direction: column; gap: 24px; text-align: center; }
      .stats-bar { flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 20px; padding: 20px 24px; }
      .zonas-bar { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; padding: 24px; }
    }
    @media (max-width: 600px) {
      .services-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .proceso-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .section-header { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 16px; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- CURSOR -->
<div class="cursor" id="cursor"></div>
<div class="cursor-ring" id="cursorRing"></div>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav id="mainNav">
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo">
    <div class="nav-logo-cube">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <polygon points="50,5 95,30 50,55" fill="#5bc4d8" stroke="#0a0a0a" stroke-width="2"/>
        <polygon points="50,55 95,30 95,75 50,100" fill="#e8285a" stroke="#0a0a0a" stroke-width="2"/>
        <polygon points="50,55 5,30 5,75 50,100" fill="#a8c832" stroke="#0a0a0a" stroke-width="2"/>
        <polygon points="50,5 5,30 50,55" fill="#8ab020" stroke="#0a0a0a" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.7"/>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <span class="nav-logo-text">SINTAXEM</span>
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#servicios">Servicios</a></li>
    <li><a href="#trabajos">Trabajos</a></li>
    <li><a href="#nosotros">Nosotros</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contacto" class="nav-cta">Contactar</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-left">
    <p class="hero-tag">Design & Productions · Barcelona, Tarragona & Baleares</p>
    <h1 class="hero-title">
      Tu marca.<br>
      En cada<br>
      <span>superficie.</span>
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">
      Estudio de artes gráficas especializado en vinilos decorativos, rotulación de vehículos y cartelería profesional. Del diseño a la colocación, todo en uno.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-actions">
      <a href="https://wa.me/34629170153?text=Hola%2C%20me%20interesa%20un%20presupuesto" class="btn-primary" target="_blank">
        <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M8 12h.01M12 12h.01M16 12h.01M21 12c0 4.418-4.03 8-9 8a9.863 9.863 0 01-4.255-.949L3 20l1.395-3.72C3.512 15.042 3 13.574 3 12c0-4.418 4.03-8 9-8s9 3.582 9 8z"/></svg>
        Pedir presupuesto
      </a>
      <a href="#trabajos" class="btn-secondary">
        Ver trabajos →
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-right">
    <div class="hero-image-grid">
      <div class="hero-img-main">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Furgoneta rotulada profesional" />
      </div>
      <div class="hero-img-row">
        <div class="hero-img-small">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Vinilo decorativo interior" />
        </div>
        <div class="hero-img-small">
          <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1618221195710-dd6b41faaea6?w=500&q=85" alt="Vinilo decorativo interior" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-scroll-hint">
    <div class="scroll-line"></div>
    Scroll para explorar
  </div>
</section>

<!-- STATS BAR -->
<div class="stats-bar">
  <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-num">+100</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Proyectos realizados</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-num">5+</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Años de experiencia</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-num">2</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Provincias</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-num">100%</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Colocación propia</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SERVICIOS -->
<section class="section" id="servicios">
  <div class="section-header reveal">
    <div>
      <p class="section-label">01 — Lo que hacemos</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Nuestros<br><em>Servicios</em></h2>
    </div>
    <a href="#contacto" class="section-link">Solicitar presupuesto →</a>
  </div>
  <div class="services-grid">

    <div class="service-card reveal">
      <div class="service-num">01</div>
      <svg class="service-icon" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <rect x="4" y="16" width="40" height="20" rx="4" stroke="#e8285a" stroke-width="2"/>
        <circle cx="12" cy="36" r="4" stroke="#e8285a" stroke-width="2"/>
        <circle cx="36" cy="36" r="4" stroke="#e8285a" stroke-width="2"/>
        <path d="M4 24h40M16 16V12M32 16V12" stroke="#e8285a" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      </svg>
      <div class="service-name">Rotulación de Vehículos</div>
      <p class="service-desc">Furgonetas, coches, motos y flotas. Vinilos de corte, impresión digital y full wrap. Tu negocio en movimiento.</p>
      <div class="service-arrow">
        <svg width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M7 17L17 7M7 7h10v10"/></svg>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="service-card reveal">
      <div class="service-num">02</div>
      <svg class="service-icon" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <rect x="6" y="6" width="36" height="36" rx="2" stroke="#a8c832" stroke-width="2"/>
        <path d="M6 18h36M18 6v36" stroke="#a8c832" stroke-width="2"/>
        <rect x="20" y="20" width="20" height="20" fill="#a8c832" fill-opacity="0.2"/>
      </svg>
      <div class="service-name">Vinilos Decorativos</div>
      <p class="service-desc">Hogar, muebles, cocinas, baños y negocios. Transforma cualquier espacio con vinilos a medida de alta calidad.</p>
      <div class="service-arrow">
        <svg width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M7 17L17 7M7 7h10v10"/></svg>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="service-card reveal">
      <div class="service-num">03</div>
      <svg class="service-icon" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <rect x="4" y="10" width="40" height="28" rx="2" stroke="#5bc4d8" stroke-width="2"/>
        <path d="M14 22h20M14 28h12" stroke="#5bc4d8" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
        <circle cx="38" cy="14" r="4" fill="#5bc4d8" fill-opacity="0.3" stroke="#5bc4d8" stroke-width="2"/>
      </svg>
      <div class="service-name">Cartelería & Señalética</div>
      <p class="service-desc">Rótulos de local, señalética interior y exterior, vidrieras y escaparates. Presencia que impacta.</p>
      <div class="service-arrow">
        <svg width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M7 17L17 7M7 7h10v10"/></svg>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="service-card reveal">
      <div class="service-num">04</div>
      <svg class="service-icon" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <path d="M8 40L20 28l8 8 12-16" stroke="#e8285a" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        <circle cx="36" cy="12" r="6" stroke="#e8285a" stroke-width="2"/>
        <path d="M34 12l1.5 1.5L38 10" stroke="#e8285a" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
      </svg>
      <div class="service-name">Diseño Gráfico</div>
      <p class="service-desc">Logos, identidad visual, tarjetas y material corporativo. Diseño profesional adaptado a tu negocio.</p>
      <div class="service-arrow">
        <svg width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M7 17L17 7M7 7h10v10"/></svg>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- TRABAJOS -->
<section class="works-section" id="trabajos">
  <div class="section-header reveal">
    <div>
      <p class="section-label">02 — Portfolio</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Trabajos<br><em>Realizados</em></h2>
    </div>
    <a href="#contacto" class="section-link" style="color:rgba(245,242,237,0.4); border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);">Ver todos →</a>
  </div>
  <div class="works-grid reveal">
    <div class="work-card">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Rotulación furgoneta Sprinter" />
      <div class="work-overlay">
        <div class="work-tag">Rotulación</div>
        <div class="work-title">Instalaciones Arli — Furgoneta VW</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="work-card">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Vinilo vidriera premium" />
      <div class="work-overlay">
        <div class="work-tag">Vinilos Decorativos</div>
        <div class="work-title">Glossy — Mamparas de baño</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="work-card">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Vinilo decorativo pared" />
      <div class="work-overlay">
        <div class="work-tag">Cartelería</div>
        <div class="work-title">Señalética comercial</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="work-card reveal">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Vinilo escaparate local" />
      <div class="work-overlay">
        <div class="work-tag">Cartelería</div>
        <div class="work-title">Vinilo full — Fachada local</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="work-card reveal">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Vinilo decorativo corporativo" />
      <div class="work-overlay">
        <div class="work-tag">Decoración Interior</div>
        <div class="work-title">Vinilo corporativo — Oficina</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="work-card reveal">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Vinilo vidriera cafe" />
      <div class="work-overlay">
        <div class="work-tag">Cartelería</div>
        <div class="work-title">Vinilo artístico — Escaparate</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROCESO -->
<section class="proceso-section">
  <div class="section-header reveal">
    <div>
      <p class="section-label">03 — Cómo trabajamos</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">El <em>Proceso</em></h2>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="proceso-grid">
    <div class="proceso-step reveal">
      <div class="proceso-step-num">01</div>
      <div class="proceso-icon">
        <svg width="20" height="20" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="white"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M8 12h.01M12 12h.01M16 12h.01M21 12c0 4.418-4.03 8-9 8a9.863 9.863 0 01-4.255-.949L3 20l1.395-3.72C3.512 15.042 3 13.574 3 12c0-4.418 4.03-8 9-8s9 3.582 9 8z"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="proceso-title">Consulta</div>
      <p class="proceso-desc">Nos contás qué necesitás. WhatsApp, email o formulario. Respondemos en menos de 24h.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="proceso-step reveal">
      <div class="proceso-step-num">02</div>
      <div class="proceso-icon" style="background:var(--cube-green)">
        <svg width="20" height="20" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="white"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M9 12h6m-6 4h6m2 5H7a2 2 0 01-2-2V5a2 2 0 012-2h5.586a1 1 0 01.707.293l5.414 5.414a1 1 0 01.293.707V19a2 2 0 01-2 2z"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="proceso-title">Presupuesto</div>
      <p class="proceso-desc">Preparamos un presupuesto personalizado sin compromiso. Claro, detallado y ajustado a tu necesidad.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="proceso-step reveal">
      <div class="proceso-step-num">03</div>
      <div class="proceso-icon" style="background:var(--cube-blue)">
        <svg width="20" height="20" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="white"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M15.232 5.232l3.536 3.536m-2.036-5.036a2.5 2.5 0 113.536 3.536L6.5 21.036H3v-3.572L16.732 3.732z"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="proceso-title">Diseño</div>
      <p class="proceso-desc">Creamos el diseño o adaptamos el tuyo. Presentamos pruebas hasta que sea perfecto.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="proceso-step reveal">
      <div class="proceso-step-num">04</div>
      <div class="proceso-icon">
        <svg width="20" height="20" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="white"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="proceso-title">Colocación</div>
      <p class="proceso-desc">Instalación profesional en tu domicilio o negocio. Resultado impecable, sin líos ni sorpresas.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SOBRE NOSOTROS -->
<section class="about-section" id="nosotros">
  <div class="about-image-stack reveal">
    <div class="about-img-1">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Señalética corporativa" />
    </div>
    <div class="about-img-2">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Vinilo lettering interior" />
    </div>
    <div class="about-badge">
      <span>5+</span>
      Años<br>activos
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="about-content reveal">
    <p class="section-label">04 — Sobre nosotros</p>
    <h2 class="about-title">Técnica,<br>diseño y<br><em>pasión.</em></h2>
    <p class="about-text">Soy Lucas, diseñador gráfico y técnico industrial con taller propio. En SINTAXEM me ocupo de todo el proceso: del diseño a la colocación, con las herramientas y el know-how para hacerlo bien.</p>
    <p class="about-text">No subcontrato la instalación. Yo mismo me desplazo a tu negocio o casa para garantizar un acabado profesional. Ese es mi fuerte.</p>
    <div class="about-skills">
      <span class="skill-tag">Diseño gráfico</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Técnico industrial</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Colocación propia</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Taller equipado</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Vinilo de corte</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Impresión digital</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ZONAS -->
<div class="zonas-bar">
  <span class="zonas-label">Zonas de trabajo</span>
  <div class="zonas-list">
    <span class="zona">Barcelona</span>
    <span class="zona">Tarragona</span>
    <span class="zona">Costa Daurada</span>
    <span class="zona">Baix Penedès</span>
    <span class="zona">Baleares</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CONTACTO -->
<section class="contact-section" id="contacto">
  <div class="contact-left reveal">
    <p class="section-label">05 — Hablemos</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">¿Tienes<br>un<br><em>proyecto?</em></h2>
    <div class="contact-info">
      <div class="contact-item">
        <div class="contact-item-icon">
          <svg width="18" height="18" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="#e8285a"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M3 5a2 2 0 012-2h3.28a1 1 0 01.948.684l1.498 4.493a1 1 0 01-.502 1.21l-2.257 1.13a11.042 11.042 0 005.516 5.516l1.13-2.257a1 1 0 011.21-.502l4.493 1.498a1 1 0 01.684.949V19a2 2 0 01-2 2h-1C9.716 21 3 14.284 3 6V5z"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div class="contact-item-content">
          <div class="contact-item-label">WhatsApp</div>
          <div class="contact-item-value">
            <a href="https://wa.me/34629170153" target="_blank">+34 629 170 153</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-item">
        <div class="contact-item-icon">
          <svg width="18" height="18" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="#5bc4d8"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M3 8l7.89 5.26a2 2 0 002.22 0L21 8M5 19h14a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2z"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div class="contact-item-content">
          <div class="contact-item-label">Email</div>
          <div class="contact-item-value">
            <a href="mailto:info@sintaxem.com">info@sintaxem.com</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-item">
        <div class="contact-item-icon">
          <svg width="18" height="18" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="#a8c832"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M17.657 16.657L13.414 20.9a1.998 1.998 0 01-2.827 0l-4.244-4.243a8 8 0 1111.314 0z"/><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M15 11a3 3 0 11-6 0 3 3 0 016 0z"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div class="contact-item-content">
          <div class="contact-item-label">Zona de trabajo</div>
          <div class="contact-item-value">Barcelona, Tarragona & Baleares</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <a href="https://wa.me/34629170153?text=Hola%20Lucas%2C%20me%20interesa%20un%20presupuesto%20para..." class="whatsapp-btn" target="_blank">
      <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg>
      Escribir por WhatsApp
    </a>
  </div>

  <div class="contact-form reveal">
    <div class="form-row">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Nombre</label>
        <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Tu nombre" />
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Teléfono / Email</label>
        <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Contacto" />
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Servicio</label>
      <select class="form-select form-input">
        <option value="">Selecciona un servicio...</option>
        <option>Rotulación de Vehículos</option>
        <option>Vinilos Decorativos</option>
        <option>Cartelería & Señalética</option>
        <option>Diseño Gráfico</option>
        <option>Otro / Consulta</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Cuéntanos tu proyecto</label>
      <textarea class="form-textarea" placeholder="Describe qué necesitas, medidas aproximadas, plazo..."></textarea>
    </div>
    <button class="form-submit" onclick="sendWhatsApp()">
      Enviar consulta
      <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M14 5l7 7m0 0l-7 7m7-7H3"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-logo">SINTAXEM</div>
  <div class="footer-copy">© 2024 Sintaxem Design & Productions · Barcelona, Tarragona & Baleares</div>
  <div class="footer-social">
    <a href="mailto:info@sintaxem.com" title="Email">
      <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M3 8l7.89 5.26a2 2 0 002.22 0L21 8M5 19h14a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2z"/></svg>
    </a>
    <a href="https://wa.me/34629170153" target="_blank" title="WhatsApp">
      <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg>
    </a>
    <a href="#" title="Instagram">
      <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="5" ry="5" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M16 11.37A4 4 0 1112.63 8 4 4 0 0116 11.37z" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="17.5" y1="6.5" x2="17.51" y2="6.5" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
    </a>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
  // Custom cursor
  const cursor = document.getElementById('cursor');
  const ring = document.getElementById('cursorRing');
  document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
    cursor.style.left = e.clientX + 'px';
    cursor.style.top = e.clientY + 'px';
    setTimeout(() => {
      ring.style.left = e.clientX + 'px';
      ring.style.top = e.clientY + 'px';
    }, 80);
  });

  // Nav scroll
  const nav = document.getElementById('mainNav');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    nav.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 60);
  });

  // Reveal on scroll
  const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach((entry, i) => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        setTimeout(() => entry.target.classList.add('visible'), i * 80);
        observer.unobserve(entry.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.1 });
  reveals.forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

  // WhatsApp form
  function sendWhatsApp() {
    const name = document.querySelector('.form-input').value;
    const service = document.querySelector('.form-select').value;
    const msg = document.querySelector('.form-textarea').value;
    const text = `Hola Lucas, soy ${name || 'un cliente'}. Me interesa: ${service || 'un servicio'}. ${msg}`;
    window.open('https://wa.me/34629170153?text=' + encodeURIComponent(text), '_blank');
  }
</script>
</body>
</html>
